name: medical_schemes_april_2026_options
query:
-- April 2026 Detailed DOCTOR Option List — full scheme/plan rows with 6-digit option codes (column R).
-- Parsed from April 2026 Detailed DOCTOR Option List.xlsx (effective April 2026).
-- Drops legacy unique(code); the same 6-digit code often appears on both a DD and a P&C row (same option).
-- Some schemes use different 6-digit codes for DD vs P&C (e.g. CDE PRIMARY … DD vs P&C); those are separate rows.
-- Claim routing uses claim type (DD vs P&C) with lib/medikredit/doctor-option-catalog.ts — see resolveOptionByPlanName.

BEGIN;

ALTER TABLE public.medical_schemes DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS medical_schemes_code_key;

TRUNCATE public.medical_schemes;
